channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Growing Threat of GPS Disruption to Commercial Shipping and Maritime Safety
item.description: The conflict in Iran has exposed a critical vulnerability in maritime navigation: GPS disruption. Modern ships rely heavily on satellite navigation, which can be manipulated or blocked, leading vessel...

item.title: Environmental authorisation of Nuclear-1 power station challenged in court
item.description: Three environmental justice organisations—Safcei, Greenpeace Africa, and Earthlife Africa Johannesburg—have taken Eskom to the High Court over the environmental authorisation for the proposed Nuclear-...

item.title: Blue Mountains highway closed for minimum three months due to major structural failure
item.description: The Great Western Highway through the Blue Mountains will remain closed for at least three months following a major geotechnical failure, raising significant concerns for residents and businesses in w...

item.title: LPG shortage in India disrupts weddings, food services, and daily life amid Iran conflict
item.description: The ongoing war in Iran has significantly disrupted LPG and oil supplies to India, impacting daily life across the country. Small-scale caterers, tiffin services, and restaurants are facing severe sho...

item.title: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla emphasises equality of rules for all members
item.description: In New Delhi, following the rejection of a no-confidence motion against him, Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla has resumed his official duties and firmly stated that the parliamentary rules are the same for ...

item.title: Nairobi County Offers One-Month Levy Waiver to Support Flood Recovery
item.description: Nairobi County Government has announced a one-month waiver on all levies and approvals normally required for residents to carry out repair and maintenance works on properties damaged by the recent hea...

item.title: Regina Explores Options for Library Renewal Project Amid Financial Constraints
item.description: The City of Regina and Regina Public Library (RPL) are actively seeking a feasible solution for a planned renewal project as the municipality confronts significant debt challenges. The project, aimed ...

item.title: Philippine Stock Market Outlook Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: The Philippine Stock Exchange (PSE) has experienced significant volatility following the US and Israel’s attack on Iran on February 28, 2026. The PSEi fell sharply to 6,006.22 on March 9, breaking bel...

item.title: Parole board rejects request for escorted family visits by convicted murderer Mark Twitchell
item.description: Mark Twitchell, a convicted murderer serving a life sentence in Alberta, was denied permission by the parole board for two short, escorted visits to see his parents. Twitchell, who murdered Johnny Alt...

item.title: EFCC Witness Confirms Prepayment of $760,000 School Fees for Yahaya Bello’s Children at AISA
item.description: During the FCT High Court proceedings in Maitama, Abuja, a prosecution witness, Nicholas Okehone, who is an Internal Auditor at the American International School, Abuja (AISA), disclosed how over $760...

item.title: MPs warn BBC World Service risks losing global influence amid funding cuts and management issues
item.description: The BBC World Service is facing a decline in its global influence due to a combination of reduced funding and weak management, according to a report by the Public Accounts Committee (PAC). The service...

item.title: President Samia reaffirms rule of law, accountability, and peace after October 29 incidents
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan met with the UN Secretary-General’s Special Envoy, Parfait Onanga-Anyanga, at Dodoma State House to discuss the events that happened on October 29, 2025, which turned vio...

item.title: Inquiry reveals details of Matlala’s financial support to Gen Shibiri
item.description: Maj-Gen Richard Shibiri appeared before the Madlanga Commission to explain the money he received from Vusimusi “Cat” Matlala. The commission examined bank statements which showed that Shibiri had over...

item.description: The St George Illawarra Dragons kick off their NRL home season this weekend with a clash against the Melbourne Storm, drawing the attention of local footy enthusiasts. For fans wanting to immerse them...

item.title: Chris Stipdonk Sets New Knuckle Hop Records at Arctic Winter Games
item.description: Chris Stipdonk, a 40-year-old athlete from Fort Simpson, Northwest Territories, has set two new records in the knuckle hop at the 2026 Arctic Winter Games in Whitehorse, covering 66.142 metres (217 fe...

item.title: House of Representatives Approves Bill to Schedule First BARMM Parliamentary Elections in September 2026
item.description: The House of Representatives has approved on third and final reading House Bill No. 8220, which sets a new date for the long-delayed first parliamentary elections in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region i...

item.title: Matt Golding's Recent Political Cartoons: A Collection of 30 Illustrations
item.description: This gallery from The Age showcases the latest work by renowned Australian cartoonist Matt Golding, featuring 30 sharp and satirical illustrations. Published on 13 March 2026, the collection captures ...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi's remarks on energy policy and US-Russia oil waiver create stir in Lok Sabha
item.description: In the Lok Sabha session on Thursday, Congress leader Rahul Gandhi faced interruptions while addressing the House on the energy crisis. During his speech, Gandhi targeted Union Minister Hardeep Puri, ...

item.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Vows Retaliation as Conflict Escalates in Middle East
item.description: Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, has made his first public statement since assuming power, vowing to avenge the deaths of martyrs and signalling continued aggression in the regio...

item.title: Rox AI Raises Funding, Achieving $1.2 Billion Valuation for AI Sales Platform
item.description: Rox AI, a startup founded in 2024 by Ishan Mukherjee, who previously co-founded Pixie and served as New Relic's chief growth officer, has reached a $1.2 billion valuation following its latest funding ...
